name: Baskets
notes: Selected by Baskets.Id via BasketWithItemsSpecification — eagerly loads BasketItems collection.
Not mutated by this service — basket deletion is done by a separate call to BasketService.DeleteBasketAsync.

name: BasketItems
notes: Loaded via the eager-load .Include(b => b.Items) in BasketWithItemsSpecification.
UnitPrice (the price at add-time) and Quantity are read to populate each OrderItem — never the current catalog price.

name: Catalog
notes: Fetched in a single batch SELECT via CatalogItemsSpecification(catalogItemIds[]).
Only Name and PictureUri are read — they are snapshotted into CatalogItemOrdered as an immutable value object, so order history is unaffected by future catalog changes.

name: Orders
notes: Single row inserted per checkout via IRepository<Order>.AddAsync; OrderDate defaults to DateTimeOffset.Now.
ShipToAddress is an owned value object stored as flat columns with the ShipToAddress_ prefix — all five address fields are required (non-nullable) as of migration 20211231093753_FixShipToAddress.

name: OrderItems
notes: One row inserted per basket item via EF Core cascade when Order is added.

CatalogItemOrdered is stored as three flat columns (ItemOrdered_CatalogItemId, ItemOrdered_ProductName, ItemOrdered_PictureUri) — a snapshot of the catalog at order time, not a foreign key to the live Catalog table.
